summary: In-process OAuth2 PKCE void-callback flow: opens Tesla's real login page in the default browser, parses the redirected URL the user pastes back, exchanges the code for refresh+access tokens.
reason: Default `tesla auth login` should work for users without adriankumpf/tesla_auth installed. The void-callback trick (redirect_uri=https://auth.tesla.com/void/callback) avoids a webview or custom-scheme handler; Tesla owns MFA, captcha, and SMS at their own login page.
validated_outcome: 15 PKCE tests pass; verifier length matches RFC 7636 minimum, S256 challenge matches expected base64url, URL parsing tolerates whitespace, quotes, missing code, cancellation envelopes, malformed input.
